strengths: 19+ years of full-stack experience with direct, current proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and React demonstrated across multiple senior-level roles
Explicit AI-agent infrastructure expertise in current role at re:cinq, directly matching job's requirement for AI agent development experience
Strong engineering culture with demonstrated TDD practices, testing workshops, open source contributions, and conference presentations
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned on resume despite being primary stack requirement; would require learning curve though Node.js foundation is strong
Vitest and specific testing framework expertise not documented; testing culture is evident but framework-specific hands-on experience unclear
Kubernetes not explicitly demonstrated; Docker and CI/CD proven but container orchestration depth unknown
response.justification: Strong technical fit with 19+ years of experience well above the 6+ requirement. Currently employed at Staff level at re:cinq working with exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js) and explicitly on AI-agent infrastructure—a rare and valuable skill directly addressing a key job requirement. Demonstrates deep engineering culture, testing practices, and architectural thinking across multiple senior roles. Minor gaps in Nest.js and Vitest are easily learnable given strong Node.js and testing fundamentals.
